title: Updates - Mutual Recognition Agreements - Canada.ca
content:
## Updates - Mutual Recognition Agreements
Date of last update: May 31 st , 2021
Canada is a participant to Mutual Recognition Agreements ( MRA s), covering drug/medicinal products Good Manufacturing Practices ( GMP ) Compliance Programmes, with the Parties listed below:
